title: Morning's Eternal Song

sections.label: Intro
lines: Generate a soft, subtle track with smooth transitions.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: At the break of dawn, I lift my voice,
A hymn of joy, my heart’s first choice.
Your works, O Lord, a masterpiece,
From endless skies to ocean’s peace.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: How great are Your wonders, too vast to name,
Each day proclaims Your boundless flame.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, how sweet to sing Your praise,
Through golden morns and twilight’s haze.
You make my spirit rise and soar,
A love unending, forevermore.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The righteous bloom like the cedar tall,
Firmly rooted, we shall not fall.
In Your courts, we thrive and grow,
Your light the sun, Your grace the glow.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Through every season, Your truth remains,
Your steadfast love, the sweetest refrain.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, how sweet to sing Your praise,
Through golden morns and twilight’s haze.
You make my spirit rise and soar,
A love unending, forevermore.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: In the shadows of the night,
You are my song, my guiding light.
Your melody, a healing stream,
Awakens hope, restores the dream.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Oh, how sweet to sing Your praise,
Through golden morns and twilight’s haze.
You make my spirit rise and soar,
A love unending, forevermore.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Forevermore, forevermore...

epigraph: how great are thy works! and thy thoughts are very deep
